CodeEditorModel.Text:
'************************************************************************************* '* Popup management '* Autor: Pierre Clot '* Date: 2026.03.16 '* Version: S05V01 '* '* Description : '* Management of recipe system for PCS, with status and text on the header. '* '* S05V01 Rename subroutine, enum and variables name. '* '* v3: Add windows icone '* '* v2: Add text box componant if the text as too much line '* '* v1: Create pop-up windows and scripte. '* '*************************************************************************************
' 'Public Sub Load
' ' Add handler to get the response from user ' RemoveHandler S_MsgBox.Response, AddressOf _LoadReturn ' AddHandler S_MsgBox.Response, AddressOf _LoadReturn
' ' Open pop up message box ' Call S_MsgBox.MsgBox(GetResourceString("THE_Rcp_LoadConf"), GetResourceString("THE_Rcp_Load"), S_MsgBox.MessageBoxIcon.Warning, S_MsgBox.MessageBoxButtons.YesNo )
'End Sub
'Private Sub _LoadReturn(button As S_MsgBox.DialogResult)
' ' Remove handler ' RemoveHandler S_MsgBox.Response, AddressOf _LoadReturn
' ' If response is Yes, load the recipe ' If button = S_MsgBox.DialogResult.Yes Then ' _Load() ' End If
'End Sub
#Region "Enumeration of pop-up"
''' <summary> ''' Specifies identifiers to indicate the return value of a dialog box. ''' </summary> Public Enum eResult None = 0 ' Nothing is returned from the dialog box. This means that the modal dialog is closed OK = 1 ' The dialog box return value is OK Cancel = 2 ' The dialog box return value is Cancel Yes = 3 ' The dialog box return value is Yes No = 4 ' The dialog box return value is No 'Abort = 5 ' The dialog box return value is Abort 'Retry = 6 ' The dialog box return value is Retry 'Ignore = 7 ' The dialog box return value is Ignore End Enum
''' <summary> ''' Specifies constants defining which buttons to display on a MessageBox. ''' </summary> Public Enum eButtons None = 0 ' The message box contains no button. OK = 1 ' The message box contains an OK button. OKCancel = 2 ' The message box contains OK And Cancel buttons. YesNo = 3 ' The message box contains Yes and No buttons. YesNoCancel = 4 ' The message box contains Yes, No, and Cancel buttons. 'RetryCancel ' The message box contains Retry and Cancel buttons. 'AbortRetryIgnore ' The message box contains Abort, Retry, and Ignore buttons. End Enum
''' <summary> ''' Specifies constants defining which information to display. ''' </summary> Public Enum eIcon None = 0 ' The message box contains no symbols. Info = 1 ' The message box contains a symbol consisting Of a lowercase letter i In a circle. Question = 2 ' The message box contains a symbol consisting of a question mark in a circle. Success = 3 ' The message box contains a symbol consisting of an tick in a circle with a green background. Warning = 4 ' The message box contains a symbol consisting of an exclamation point in a triangle with a yellow background. Erreur = 5 ' The message box contains a symbol consisting of white X in a circle with a red background. End Enum
#End Region
''' <summary> ''' Event run when the user choose a response. ''' </summary> Public Event Response(ByVal Value As eResult)
' Variables for the popup Public Dim _Text As String Public Dim _Caption As String Public Dim _Icon As eIcon Public Dim _Buttons As eButtons Public Dim _IconWindows As String
#Region "MsgBox call function"
''' <summary> ''' Show pop up message box ''' </summary> ''' <param name="text">Text of message pop-up</param> Public Sub Show(text As String) _Show(text, "", eIcon.None, eButtons.OK, Nothing) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Show pop up message box ''' </summary> ''' <param name="text">Text of message pop-up</param> ''' <param name="caption">Caption of pop-up windows</param> Public Sub Show(text As String, caption As String) _Show(text, caption, eIcon.None, eButtons.OK, Nothing) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Show pop up message box ''' </summary> ''' <param name="text">Text of message pop-up</param> ''' <param name="icon">One of the MessageBoxIcon values that specifies which icon to display in the message box.</param> Public Sub Show(text As String, icon As eIcon) _Show(text, "", icon, eButtons.OK, Nothing) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Show pop up message box ''' </summary> ''' <param name="text">Text of message pop-up</param> ''' <param name="caption">Caption of pop-up windows</param> ''' <param name="icon">One of the MessageBoxIcon values that specifies which icon to display in the message box.</param> Public Sub Show(text As String, caption As String, icon As eIcon) _Show(text, caption, icon, eButtons.OK, Nothing) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Show pop up message box ''' </summary> ''' <param name="text">Text of message pop-up</param> Public Sub Show(text As String, buttons As eButtons) _Show(text, "", eIcon.None, buttons, Nothing) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Show pop up message box ''' </summary> ''' <param name="text">Text of message pop-up</param> ''' <param name="caption">Caption of pop-up windows</param> ''' <param name="buttons">One of the MessageBoxButtons values that specifies which buttons to display in the message box.</param> Public Sub Show(text As String, caption As String, buttons As eButtons) _Show(text, caption, eIcon.None, buttons, Nothing) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Show pop up message box ''' </summary> ''' <param name="text">Text of message pop-up</param> ''' <param name="icon">One of the MessageBoxIcon values that specifies which icon to display in the message box.</param> ''' <param name="buttons">One of the MessageBoxButtons values that specifies which buttons to display in the message box.</param> Public Sub Show(text As String, icon As eIcon, buttons As eButtons) _Show(text, "", icon, buttons, Nothing) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Show pop up message box ''' </summary> ''' <param name="text">Text of message pop-up</param> ''' <param name="caption">Caption of pop-up windows</param> ''' <param name="icon">One of the MessageBoxIcon values that specifies which icon to display in the message box.</param> ''' <param name="buttons">One of the MessageBoxButtons values that specifies which buttons to display in the message box.</param> Public Sub Show(text As String, caption As String, icon As eIcon, buttons As eButtons) _Show(text, caption, icon, buttons, Nothing) End Sub
' v3: Add windows icone
''' <summary> ''' Show pop up message box ''' </summary> ''' <param name="text">Text of message pop-up</param> ''' <param name="caption">Caption of pop-up windows</param> ''' <param name="iconWindows">Change the icon of the window with the name of an image resource.</param> Public Sub Show(text As String, caption As String, iconWindows As Object) _Show(text, caption, eIcon.None, eButtons.OK, iconWindows) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Show pop up message box ''' </summary> ''' <param name="text">Text of message pop-up</param> ''' <param name="icon">One of the MessageBoxIcon values that specifies which icon to display in the message box.</param> ''' <param name="iconWindows">Change the icon of the window with the name of an image resource.</param> Public Sub Show(text As String, icon As eIcon, iconWindows As Object) _Show(text, "", icon, eButtons.OK, iconWindows) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Show pop up message box ''' </summary> ''' <param name="text">Text of message pop-up</param> ''' <param name="caption">Caption of pop-up windows</param> ''' <param name="icon">One of the MessageBoxIcon values that specifies which icon to display in the message box.</param> ''' <param name="iconWindows">Change the icon of the window with the name of an image resource.</param> Public Sub Show(text As String, caption As String, icon As eIcon, iconWindows As Object) _Show(text, caption, icon, eButtons.OK, iconWindows) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Show pop up message box ''' </summary> ''' <param name="text">Text of message pop-up</param> ''' <param name="iconWindows">Change the icon of the window with the name of an image resource.</param> Public Sub Show(text As String, buttons As eButtons, iconWindows As Object) _Show(text, "", eIcon.None, buttons, iconWindows) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Show pop up message box ''' </summary> ''' <param name="text">Text of message pop-up</param> ''' <param name="caption">Caption of pop-up windows</param> ''' <param name="buttons">One of the MessageBoxButtons values that specifies which buttons to display in the message box.</param> ''' <param name="iconWindows">Change the icon of the window with the name of an image resource.</param> Public Sub Show(text As String, caption As String, buttons As eButtons, iconWindows As Object) _Show(text, caption, eIcon.None, buttons, iconWindows) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Show pop up message box ''' </summary> ''' <param name="text">Text of message pop-up</param> ''' <param name="icon">One of the MessageBoxIcon values that specifies which icon to display in the message box.</param> ''' <param name="buttons">One of the MessageBoxButtons values that specifies which buttons to display in the message box.</param> ''' <param name="iconWindows">Change the icon of the window with the name of an image resource.</param> Public Sub Show(text As String, icon As eIcon, buttons As eButtons, iconWindows As Object) _Show(text, "", icon, buttons, iconWindows) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Show pop up message box ''' </summary> ''' <param name="text">Text of message pop-up</param> ''' <param name="caption">Caption of pop-up windows</param> ''' <param name="icon">One of the MessageBoxIcon values that specifies which icon to display in the message box.</param> ''' <param name="buttons">One of the MessageBoxButtons values that specifies which buttons to display in the message box.</param> ''' <param name="iconWindows">Change the icon of the window with the name of an image resource.</param> Public Sub Show(text As String, caption As String, icon As eIcon, buttons As eButtons, iconWindows As Object) _Show(text, caption, icon, buttons, iconWindows) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Local call of message box ''' </summary> ''' <param name="text">Text of message pop-up</param> ''' <param name="caption">Caption of pop-up windows</param> ''' <param name="icon">One of the MessageBoxIcon values that specifies which icon to display in the message box.</param> ''' <param name="buttons">One of the MessageBoxButtons values that specifies which buttons to display in the message box.</param> ''' <param name="iconWindows">Change the icon of the window with the name of an image resource.</param> Private Sub _Show(text As String, caption As String, icon As eIcon, buttons As eButtons, iconWindows As Object)
' Save parameters for the pop-up _Text = text _Caption = caption _Icon = icon _Buttons = buttons _IconWindows = CType(iconWindows, String)
' Show pop-up page ShowPage("MsgBox")
End Sub
#End Region
#Region "Respons from MsgBox"
Public Sub Press_Yes ClosePage("MsgBox") RaiseEvent Response(eResult.Yes) End Sub
Public Sub Press_No ClosePage("MsgBox") RaiseEvent Response(eResult.No) End Sub
Public Sub Press_Ok ClosePage("MsgBox") RaiseEvent Response(eResult.Ok) End Sub
Public Sub Press_Cancel ClosePage("MsgBox") RaiseEvent Response(eResult.Cancel) End Sub
Public Sub Press_Close ClosePage("MsgBox") RaiseEvent Response(eResult.None) End Sub
#End Region
#Region "Popup for inverter"
''' <summary> ''' Call pop up window when the teaching of the invertor is done. ''' </summary> Public Sub Inverter_OnTeached Call Show(GetResourceString("OBJ_Inverter_Teached"), GetResourceString("THE_Inverter"), eIcon.Success, eButtons.OK) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Call pop up window when the teaching of the invertor is done. ''' </summary> Public Sub Inverter_OnSave Call Show(GetResourceString("OBJ_Inverter_Save"), GetResourceString("THE_Inverter"), eIcon.Info, eButtons.OK) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Call pop up window when the teaching of the invertor is done. ''' </summary> Public Sub Inverter_OnLoad Call Show(GetResourceString("OBJ_Inverter_Load"), GetResourceString("THE_Inverter"), eIcon.Success, eButtons.OK) End Sub
''' <summary> ''' Call pop up window when the teaching of the invertor is done. ''' </summary> Public Sub Inverter_OnFail Call Show(GetResourceString("OBJ_Inverter_Fail"), GetResourceString("THE_Inverter"), eIcon.Erreur, eButtons.OK) End Sub
#End Region
